body_txt: Ms. Fanservice is someone whose entire character surrounds being exceptionally attractive, they are a monument to anyone who appreciates the female form. Important though that just being attractive isn't enough , as Hollywood Homely means even "unattractive" characters may include fashionable wardrobe and professional make-up and hairstyling. For Ms. Fanservice their very appearance needs to default towards sexual adoration and may be the source of the majority of fanservice in a given work. This may manifest through any or all of the appearances trope used for Sex Sells : deep cleavage , exposed stomachs or off-the-shoulders apparel. Careful framing of their legs, curves, hips, or derriere (even when covered), she'll usually have a body that invokes Buxom Beauty Standard or Impossible Hourglass Figure . Even if modestly dressed, her clothing serves to accentuate her figure through being tight and stretchy enough to show her bust and the outline of her hips . Other mainstays are bikinis/swimsuits , lingerie , fishnets, stockings, garters , short skirts, equally short shorts, thigh-high boots or stiletto pumps, snug sweaters , and low-cut dresses and shirts. Bonus points if she's The Tease . See Best Known for the Fanservice . It can be an effective way to bring in male fans, even in a series aimed at female viewers . Mr. Fanservice is the Spear Counterpart . There are several types of Ms. Fanservice :  While the way a Ms. Fanservice is presented can come across as sexist if handled badly, there is nothing inherently wrong with the trope itself, nor does it necessarily ruin her character . The real trick is to give her a genuine, fleshed-out personality and a meaningful role in the story beyond being eye candy , instead of having her exist solely as a Flat Character . (Besides, being "flat" usually doesn't fit this type of character ; unless she is a Fille Fatale , which isn't that acceptable in most cases .) If the Ms. Fanservice has a particularly cruel personality (usually a villain), is set on the Squick situation, and/or leads to Nightmare Fuel or Nausea Fuel , she also qualifies for Fan Disservice . A Fanservice Extra provides eye candy, but barely constitutes being a character. Please note that there is no requirement to be single to fit into this trope. Many of these characters are married. If she also sleeps with most of the crew, she either Really Gets Around or is a Good Bad Girl . Subjected to multiple Double Standard tropes, especially if she gets a nice dose of Character Development or Hidden Depths aside from her hot looks, and yet the fandom refuses to see them (or remembers nothing else about them ). Compare Head-Turning Beauty , and contrast the Token Wholesome . See also Chorus Girls , Lovely Assistant , Science Hero's Babe Assistant .
